jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest suite passed: 167 files / 656 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted successfully; /api/status healthy; /deployments redirected to login and /api/deploy-export returned 401 instead of 500; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P5 deployment export API product surface plus fresh-audit checkpoint
lastRun.summary: Wired the existing deployment export API into the Deployments page with a deploy:export-gated client panel, CSRF-backed export creation, file preview, and JSON download. Aligned the POST schema with the actual service contract so current UI payloads no longer need unused legacy format/services fields.
validation: Initial production baseline: services active, /api/status healthy, no recent service error/warn matches
recent production service logs checked with no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P5 backlog: clarify backup API behavior and restore surface, then unify system-health API and Health page behavior.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
